RULING;ARGUED (IN CAMERA SESSION)and the CourT GRANTS THE MOTION TO WITHDRAW COUNSEL ON CONDITIONS.1.) THAT CURRENT COUNSEL MR. SULLIVAN WILL SEEK CONTINUANCE BETWEEN 40 TO 45 DAYS RE DEPOSITION SET ON MAY 11, 2004.EITHER THRU STIPULATION WITH OTHER PARTY'S COUNSEL OR 2.) FILE A MOTION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE CONTINUANCE BEFORE COMMISSIONER NORRIS DEPT. ANY HEARING WITH W/ THE SAID DEPT. IS HEREBY STAYED TO 45 DAYS.Prevailing party to prepare order.THE TRANSCRIPT FOR THIS HEARING THRU IN CAMERA SESSION IS HEREBY ORDERED SEALED, AND CANNOT BE OBTAINED WITHOUT COURT ORDER.(302/REQ/JU)BELDON YEE # 2647
